title: Usopp’s Village Comes Into View
description: On pages 16–18, the Syrup Village story develops through Usopp, Kaya, Kuro, Jango, and the Straw Hats as the danger behind the village’s peaceful surface becomes clearer.
scene: This scene follows the tension around Usopp’s village: lies, loyalty, hidden plans, and the growing clash with the Black Cat Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Yasopp was a really popular pirate!

dialogue.speaker: Jango
dialogue.text: Is that really true?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: to tell you the truth, even thought he left me for the sea,

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I'm always proud of my dad!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: But that bastard Clahador looked down on him

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: He looked down on my pride!

dialogue.speaker: Jango
dialogue.text: Yup!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I don't like him at all!

dialogue.speaker: Merry
dialogue.text: Are you giving up seeing that Ojousama?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Dunno, maybe if that Butler apologizes,

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: And begs me, then I'll con- slider!

dialogue.speaker: Jango
dialogue.text: That Butler?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Yeah! That Butler...

dialogue.speaker: Jango
dialogue.text: Why is he here?

dialogue.speaker: Jango
dialogue.text: Jango, I told you not to draw the attention of the village- ERS,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Why did you sleep in the middle of the street?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: How can I attract any attention? It's not like I look weird or something!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: There's a weird- looking guy with him...

dialogue.speaker: Jango
dialogue.text: I've never seen him before, who is he?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: So... are you all pre- pared for it?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Of course!

dialogue.speaker: Merry
dialogue.text: We can start operation "assassi- Nate Ojousama" any time!

dialogue.speaker: Jango
dialogue.text: What!!? Assassinate!!?

summary: The part advances the Syrup Village arc by tying Usopp’s reputation and Kaya’s safety to the threat posed by Kuro and his crew.
